claim: For every B>=2 in the literal characteristic-five affine-prefix row with T_B=D_B and N=4B, the complete full c1 profile requires effective-Fourier multipliers at least (1/5)(25/3)^B and (1/5)(125/8)^B, and its image-normalized Sidon-heavy moment at sigma=(1/4)log(4/3) has positive normalized rate (1/4)log(15/8). The retained-slice mean consequence is conditional on the same boundary, full support slice, and intact all-diagonal fibre.

source_contract.quantifiers: B>=2, gamma in F_B, S subset D_B, |S|=2B
source_contract.retention_scope: same boundary, full support slice inside Omega_B, intact all-diagonal gamma_B fibre H_B

nonclaims: no actual C1-C9 semantic owner, primitive cell, or survival theorem
no implication from analytic nonpayment to semantic non-primitivity
no row-uniform, larger-active-set, or other-field theorem
no unconditional routing, refinement, or recurrence
no finite or asymptotic ledger payment
no Grand MCA hard input, Grand MCA, or Grand List theorem
remaining_wall: Compile every actual primitive semantic first-match cell, prove a source-valid image-scale or replacement-incidence theorem for every retained cell, and aggregate disjoint same-line budgets without interchanging sup_line sum_lambda with sum_lambda sup_line.
